titleStmt.title: SII 22.93: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 93. (A.R. No. 93 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, JAMBAI. JAMBUNĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. MAHĀMAṆḌALĒŚVARA VIRŪPĀKSHADĒVA—Śaka 1393 (A.D. 1471)

summary.p: The details of the date are given as Nandana, Mīna, ba. 9, Monday, Uttirāḍam which yield the equivalent A.D. 1473, March 22. The Śaka year should be 1394.

The inscription states that as a result of the Oḍḍiyaṉ-galabhai in the country, the worship in the temple of Tāṉtōṉṟi-Nāyanār at Śaṇbai had been stopped for ten years, and the walls of the temple itself had fallen down and the precincts had been filled with sand. In the year quoted Immaḍi Rāmappa-Nāyaka Timmappa-Nāyaka•• a chieftain of the king seems to have revived the worship in the temple, by remitting as sarvamānya 150 poṉ out of the 200 being paid as jōḍi and śūlavari to the king, leaving the remaining 50 for payment as land tax in future.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīman mahāmaṇḍaleśvaran śrīvirapratāpavirupākṣadevamahārāyar pṛdhivirājya
m paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 3 100 9 10 3 Itaṉ melc cellāniṉṟa nantaṉa varuṣattu
miṉa nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu navamiyum somavāramum peṟṟa Uttirāṭattu nāḷ śrīmatu Immaṭi Irāmappa nāyakka timmappa nāyakkar
peṇṇai vaṭakarai vāṇakoppāṭi nāṭṭu caṇpaiyāṉa virarājendra coḻapurattu Uṭaiyār tiruttāṉtoṉṟi
nāyaṉār koyil Oṭṭiyaṉ kalapaiyāy pattu varuṣam Āka Uṭai yavar mahāpūjaiyum kulaintu tirumatiḻum tiru
m carintu Āṟukutti Alaieṟum carintu puṉattalaiāy Irukkaiyil svayambhu nāthaṉ mahāpūcaikkun tiruppaṇikku co
ṉṉāḷ Iṟuttuvarum Irekaippaṭi poṉ Irunūṟṟile nūṟṟu Aympatu poṉ sarvvamānyamākak kaḻittu
nilavarikku Aimpatu poṉ Irekai Āka Iṟuttuvarumpaṭi kaṟpittu Inta Aimpatu poṉṉum vijaya varuṣa
nyam Ākak kaḻittu jaya varuṣam mutalukku coṭi cūlavarikku Eṉṟeṉṟaikkum Aimpatu poṉ varuṣam toṟum
paṭi kaṟpittom svayambhunāthan mahāpūjaikkum tiruppaṇikkum nūṟṟaympatu poṉṉum candrādityavaraiyum sarvamānyam
tām Intat taṉmattukku Ahitam paṇṇiṉavaṉ Eḻānarakattuk kiḻāṉarakam pukuvāṉ paṉmāheśvara rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 22.93 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
